query: SELECT fullName, COUNT(*) as count FROM teacher_names GROUP BY fullName HAVING count > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT fullName, COUNT(*) as count FROM teacher_names GROUP BY fullName HAVING count > 1;
